title: Argentinian Mascarpone Cheesecake
description: A dense and creamy dessert, inspired by the argentinian passion for cheese and rich flavors.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together mascarpone cheese, roasted almonds, dense granulated sugar, and vanilla extract.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing until well combined.
4. Pour mixture into a 23cm (9 inch) springform pan.
5. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
7. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or overnight.
8. Release springform pan sides and transfer to a serving bowl.
9. Serve chilled, garnished with roasted almonds if desired.
